releases.title: Issue #1 — Arrival Processing
releases.description: The first intake day overwhelms the municipal integration desk as displaced Vikings challenge every form and policy assumption.

releases.title: Issue #2 — Housing Assignment
releases.description: Temporary housing audits force staff and newcomers to negotiate kinship, privacy, and city compliance in real time.

releases.title: Pilot — Docking Gridlock
releases.description: A routine berth assignment devolves into station-wide chaos when personal rivalries and protocol collide.

releases.title: Teaser — Opening Shift
releases.description: A pristine guest day strains life-support maintenance, branding promises, and team coordination without compromising animal care.

releases.title: Trailer — Heat Debt
releases.description: An outlaw run through furnace territory reveals the debt chains and pursuit networks defining frontier survival.
